events.name: Low Stability Unrest
events.visible_report: Reports indicate growing unrest among the population; stability appears to be slipping.
events.true_cause: The country's actual stability has fallen below the unrest threshold.

events.name: Radical Interest Group Warning
events.description: A highly radical interest group signals political risk.
events.visible_report: Intelligence reports a sharp uptick in radical rhetoric from one of the country's interest groups.
events.true_cause: An interest group's actual radicalism has crossed the warning threshold.
